title: Xtra Juicy Norwegian Meat Roast
description: A resinous and juicy Norwegian dish featuring beurre-noisette, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and compatible with the Whole30 diet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and thyme.
Heat the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium heat until it turns golden brown and smells nutty.
Sear the beef roast on all sides until it is browned, then remove it from the pot and set it aside.
Add the sliced onion to the pot and cook until it is softened and caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped carrot and celery to the pot and cook until they are tender, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Return the beef roast to the pot and spoon some of the vegetables and sauce over the top of the roast.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef for 2 1/2 hours, or until it is tender and juicy.
